title: War and Sanctions Accelerate China’s Currency Push
description: China’s bid to build a renminbi-based financial system beyond the U.S. dollar’s reach is gaining traction as a way to sidestep sanctions.

title: Europe Mulls What Mutual Defense Looks Like Outside NATO
description: European Union nations have a little-known obligation to protect one another. Experts caution it is no replacement for NATO.

title: Trump intends to invite Putin to G-20 summit in Miami, officials say - The Washington Post
description: Trump intends to invite Putin to G-20 summit in Miami, officials say  The Washington Post

title: John Harbaugh’s Giants draft was a throwback in all the right ways
description: This is the way smart organizations operate. First you take the best available player if he falls in your lap. Then you keep your young quarterback protected and build the best offensive line the franchise has had since Super Bowl 46 … even if it means bypassing safety Caleb Downs and having him wind up...

title: Lead-footed NYPD cop racked up more than 500 speeding tickets in NYC since 2022: report
description: Officer James Giovansanti, 33, was caught on traffic cameras either speeding through school zones or disregarding red lights a whopping 187 times in the last year alone.

title: Makai Lemon was on phone with Steelers as Eagles traded up for him in wild NFL draft moment
description: Eagles general manager Howie Roseman beat the Steelers to the punch.
